productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Barricade Team 2 Black Sports Shoes
description: With these men's adidas BARRICADE Team 2 shoes, your speed on the court will come close to the speed of the ball coming off your racquet. That's because these tennis shoes have adiPRENE+ in the forefoot for propulsion, Torsion System midfoot support and a grippy adiWEAR 6 outsole.UpperPerforated synthetic upper for dry comfort and durabilityadiPRENE+ in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiencymiCoach compatibleComfortable textile liningLace-ups for better FitIconic three stripes symbolizing the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved on the sidesPadded collar and tongue and textile shoe lining for better comfortMidsoleMolded EVA insole for anatomical comfortTorsion System for better surface adaptation and stabilityadiPRENE insert in the heel for comfort and shock absorptionadiPRENE+ offers full-length forefoot cushioningOutsoleadiPRENE under the heel for superior cushioning at impactadiWEAR non-marking rubber outsole in a modified herringbone tread pattern with pivot point.Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
